items.definition_en: A bath is a large container for washing your body.
items.example_en: The children like to play in the bath.

items.definition_en: A shower is a place where you stand to wash yourself with water.
items.example_en: He takes a shower every morning.

items.definition_en: A sink is a bowl in the kitchen or bathroom for washing things.
items.example_en: She washes her hands in the sink.

items.definition_en: A toilet is a seat for going to the bathroom.
items.example_en: The toilet is next to the sink.

items.definition_en: A mirror is something you look in to see yourself.
items.example_en: She brushes her hair in front of the mirror.

items.definition_en: A towel is used to dry your body after a bath or shower.
items.example_en: I hang my towel on the wall.

items.definition_en: Soap is something you use to clean your hands or body.
items.example_en: He washes his hands with soap.

items.definition_en: A toothbrush is used to clean your teeth.
items.example_en: She puts toothpaste on her toothbrush.

items.definition_en: Toothpaste is a cream for cleaning your teeth.
items.example_en: He bought new toothpaste from the shop.

items.definition_en: Shampoo is a liquid for washing your hair.
items.example_en: She likes to use banana shampoo.

items.definition_en: A bathroom is a room where you wash yourself.
items.example_en: The bathroom is at the end of the hall.

items.definition_en: A bathtub is a large container that you fill with water to wash your body.
items.example_en: There is a big bathtub in our bathroom.

items.definition_en: A brush is used for cleaning or making your hair tidy.
items.example_en: She uses a brush for her hair every morning.

items.definition_en: Toilet paper is soft paper for use in the bathroom.
items.example_en: We need to buy more toilet paper.

items.definition_en: A towel rail is a bar where you hang your towel.
items.example_en: I put my towel on the towel rail.

items.definition_en: A tap is a device that controls the flow of water.
items.example_en: Turn off the tap when you finish.

items.definition_en: A laundry basket is where you put dirty clothes.
items.example_en: Please put your dirty socks in the laundry basket.
